rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Elec. Code §271.0071 governs multiple voting methods in joint elections. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: The restrictions on multiple methods of voting at the same polling place or in early voting prescribed by Sections 123.005-123.007 do not apply to a joint election
_note: No conflict; rule_text is unrelated to proposed_change.
